3034925.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3034925.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3034979.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3034979.description: Felicity brings Miguel to Catlantic City, where Miguel is locked up in the pound for being a dog. // Felicity, Miguel, Yana and Athena have to cross Phobia Forest to cash in coupons for free cupcakes.

3035021.title: Dorg van Dango
3035021.description: As the Magicals track down an alien substance for RD, General Gratch and his scientists arrive in Normill, also on the hunt for something magical... // Time is running out for Dorg and the Magicals to find the rare Numpty Newt!

3035086.title: SpongeBob
3035086.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3035857.title: SpongeBob
3035857.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3035927.title: SpongeBob
3035927.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3035965.title: Sanjay & Craig
3035965.description: Megan disguises herself as a tomboy to unwittingly convince Sanjay to be her partner at a dance competition. // Sanjay, Craig, and Hector con their way into a rad-awesome skate crew.

3036009.title: Sanjay & Craig
3036009.description: Craig meets his long-lost brother, Ronnie Slithers, who uses devious methods to try and turn the dudes against one another.

3036067.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3036067.description: The penguins plan a vacation on the high seas but a storm blows them off course onto the streets of Hoboken, New Jersey. After being taken to the Hoboken Zoo and meeting some old friends, Skipper is adamant the zoo holds a sinister secret.

3036809.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3036809.description: The Vesuvius Twins bring Skipper and Julien to their home and force them to fight one another. // Kowalski has another breakthrough invention, tiny robots that group together and not only fix broken tools and appliances, but run them as well.

3036850.title: SpongeBob
3036850.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3036910.title: SpongeBob
3036910.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3036956.title: SpongeBob
3036956.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3052299.title: SpongeBob
3052299.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3037740.title: SpongeBob
3037740.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3037797.title: SpongeBob
3037797.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3037914.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3037914.description: When Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag, he must come up with a way to replace this "one of a kind" fashion piece. Many failures later, Alvin is forced to do something his reputation may never recover from.

3037934.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3037934.description: When The Chipmunks find a baby bird that's fallen from its nest, Alvin is initially reluctant to get too attached. But the little bird soon worms his way into Alvin's hat...and heart, creating an unlikely friendship.

3038674.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3038674.description: Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home and tries a variety of ways to stop the invasion.

3038718.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3038718.description: King Julien is literally bounced out of his kingdom and onto the New York streets. // Skipper is forced to live his worst nightmare when he's doused with Inflatium and stress causes him to blow up like a balloon.

3038812.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3038812.description: The penguins accidentally launch Leonard the Koala out of the zoo and into midtown Manhattan. // When all the little mammals in the zoo start to disappear the penguins suspect the new boa constrictor, Salvio.

3038862.title: The Loud House
3038862.description: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. // Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

3039676.title: The Loud House
3039676.description: After searching for her next big scientific breakthrough, Lisa discovers Flip is a marvel of modern science. // Luna has to decide between playing in a band with her friends or with playing with professionals.

3039759.title: De Casagrandes
3039759.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. // After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

3039810.title: De Casagrandes
3039810.description: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

3039885.title: SpongeBob
3039885.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3040710.title: SpongeBob
3040710.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3040737.title: SpongeBob
3040737.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3040805.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3040805.description: Captain Man and Kid Danger use Schowz' Fish-Talker helmet to help a lost fish find his way home.

3040861.title: Dorg van Dango
3040861.description: It's Dorg's turn to look after the class hamster Zippy, but a series of magical mishaps lead the gang and the hamster into body-swapping chaos! // Dorg can't sleep. Patronella casts a spell to help him but puts all of Normill to sleep instead!

3041658.title: Sanjay & Craig
3041658.description: The search is on for Megan's two front teeth after she loses them in an epic- fail bike stunt. // Sanjay's grandmother gives the dudes a conquistador statue from Darlene's childhood - and it seems to have a mind of its own.

3041723.title: Sanjay & Craig
3041723.description: The kids are trapped on top of a garbage dumpster, surrounded by a pack of Chihuahuas. // Sanjay and Craig decide something must be done to stop Hector's close talking tendencies.

3041797.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3041797.description: Julien is horrified when the baboons' dance routine gets more attention than his own. His attempts to sabotage the baboons blow up in his face. / There's a blackout and Julien convinces everyone they should revert to "jungle law" with him as king.

3041871.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3041871.description: During a particularly cold day, the rats show up and challenge the penguins to a hockey match.

3042639.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3042639.description: Dad longs for a simpler life and decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. // When monsters start appearing in Dimmsdale, Mr. Crocker launches a web show to expose them.

3042729.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042729.description: A new mutant called Muckman starts to gain notoriety as NYC's "Monster Hero

3042780.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042780.description: The Shredder kidnaps and experiments on the Mighty Mutanimals.

3042833.title: Ollie's Pack
3042833.description: After Ollie and Captain Wowski have a spat, CW is mistaken for a stray cat and gets captured by Animal Control. // Preparing to meet a bully after school, Bernie finds a monster device in CW's closet that can help him.

3043580.title: SpongeBob
3043580.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3043635.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043635.description: Po realizes he must select a trophy for the Hall of Heroes, but instead finds himself helping a young villager retrieve a rabbit doll that is much more important than it looks.

3043734.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043734.description: Po disguises himself as the merciless villain, Tong Fo, to try and locate a hidden weapon.

3044285.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044285.description: When The Chipmunks find a baby bird that's fallen from its nest, Alvin is initially reluctant to get too attached. But the little bird soon worms his way into Alvin's hat...and heart, creating an unlikely friendship.

3044328.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044328.description: Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home and tries a variety of ways to stop the invasion.

3044349.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3044349.description: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. So, they decide to rewire the bear's hard drive, so the bear will follow their directions! But when Alvin abuses the privilege, Simon turns the tables on him.

3044370.title: SpongeBob
3044370.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3044447.title: SpongeBob
3044447.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3044498.title: De Casagrandes
3044498.description: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. // When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

3045323.title: Huize Herrie
3045323.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

3045356.title: Huize Herrie
3045356.description: Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it a secret from the other tenants.

3045409.title: Hier is Pony
3045409.description: Annie and Pony's camping trip is in jeopardy when Pony develops a fear of plants. // Heston loans Annie his brand-new coat on a cold day, but Annie knows it's only a matter of time before Pony ruins it.

3045451.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3045451.description: When Theodore disappears from his bed, leaving a blob of sticky, green slime behind, Alvin is POSITIVE that he has been kidnapped by aliens!With the help of Simon and his home-made high-tech gear, they are ready to fight the aliens and save their brother.

3046186.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3046186.description: It's Jeanette's birthday but she doesn't want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day. So the Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer her a magical, fairy-tale birthday she will ever forget.

3046211.title: SpongeBob
3046211.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3046279.title: SpongeBob
3046279.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3046361.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3046361.description: The Turtles get their first taste of high school when April's school project draws Kraang attention.

3062708.title: The Loud House
3062708.description: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. // Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

3047187.title: The Loud House
3047187.description: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and can't wait to for a whole day of father/son bonding. // Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters so he decides to take them to the mall.

3047270.title: De Casagrandes
3047270.description: Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

3047337.title: SpongeBob
3047337.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3047927.title: SpongeBob
3047927.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3048039.title: Avatar
3048039.description: While traveling towards the North Pole, the group almost gets captured by the Fire Nation.

3048132.title: Avatar
3048132.description: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across.

3048869.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3048869.description: Vicky decides to be an actress and makes Timmy help her land her first role. // Dad accidentally flushes Timmy and the fairies down the toilet.

3048928.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3048928.description: Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

3048939.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3048939.description: Tigress is forced to babysit a small child who has been separated from his parents.

3049014.title: Ollie's Pack
3049014.description: When Ollie becomes obsessed with a sour candy challenge, he convinces monster Jeffrey to eat the candy for him. // Told in documentary style, Cleo films Ollie's preparations for Bernie's surprise birthday party.

3049735.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3049735.description: Simon is elected as the school's safety monitor and gets to choose the destination of the family vacation. But when Alvin goofs off at school, he has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention and ruining the family vacation.

3049771.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3049771.description: Fed up with seeing how dependent The Chipmunks have become on their technology, Dave decides to take them camping for a weekend, without electricity, cell service or the Internet.

3049797.title: The Loud House
3049797.description: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

3049856.title: De Casagrandes
3049856.description: The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and tries to keep it a secret from Abuela. // Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction that "love will find her," until it seems to come true.

3049922.title: SpongeBob
3049922.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.
